pattern: Compute the angular position of each clock hand and return the smaller angle between them.
hints: The minute hand moves 360/60 = 6 degrees per minute; the hour hand moves 360/720 = 0.5 degrees per minute.
Convert hour to 0-11 range first, then add the contribution of the minutes to the hour hand angle.
Compute the absolute difference of the two angles, then take the minimum of that and 360 minus that.

edge_inputs.description: 12:00 both hands at zero degrees apart
hour=12 should be treated as 0 for modular arithmetic

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    hour = rng.randint(1, 12)
    minutes = rng.randint(0, 59)
    return [hour, minutes]
